title: Chimp Test Score
description: Schema for chimp test (numbered-tile ascending recall) game scores. HIGHER gridSize is better — sort leaderboards descending by gridSize.

gridSize.description: Highest grid size (tile count) completed in ascending-order recall. Higher is better.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the score was achieved

playerName.description: Display name of the player who submitted the score
